overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene showing a hooded character standing on a rocky mountain overlook, gazing at a distant snow-capped peak and lake during golden hour. Birds occasionally fly across the dramatic cloud-filled sky as the wind moves through the character's cloak.

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right above the mountain peak
second flock of birds flies across the sky
birds fly across the sky again near the mountain peak

agents.ego_description: The hooded character stands motionless on the cliff edge, cloak billowing gently in the wind, gazing out at the snow-capped mountain and lake vista.

entered.detail: tall mountain with snow-covered summit dominating the horizon, backlit by golden sun
calm reflective lake nestled in the valley below the mountain
dense forested area covering the valley slopes between the cliff and the mountain
rocky outcrop where the character stands, overlooking the drop
weathered stone pillar or ruin fragment to the left of the character

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast natural vista. A snow-capped mountain dominates the horizon beyond a tranquil lake, surrounded by dense forests. The golden hour sun illuminates the dramatic cloudscape as birds occasionally fly overhead, and the wind gently moves through the character's cloak.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that captures a hooded figure overlooking a vast, serene mountain wilderness during the golden hour. It begins with a close focus on the character standing atop a rocky outcrop, where the wind gently stirs the fabric of their cloak. As the perspective expands, the view opens up to reveal a tranquil lake nestled among dense forests, leading the eye toward a dominant snow-capped peak on the horizon. The scene then shifts upward to encompass a dramatic cloudscape illuminated by warm sunlight, while birds glide across the sky to complete the panoramic vista.
